signals.npcLine: Pulse erratic: dozens of cyphercoins flicker with low trust.

signals.clueEvent: Data brokers whisper of unseen forces stirring market flux.

signals.npcLine: New exploits detected targeting emerging cryptos. Guard your keys.

signals.worldFeed: Cyber sentries report increased hacking attempts on trending tokens.

signals.npcLine: Low trust surrounds a rising token named PENGU—handle with care.

signals.worldFeed: Algorithm pulse weakens; speculators eye unstable assets closely.
signals.clueEvent: Secret logs hint at shadow money moving under the radar.

signals.npcLine: AI-driven assets show strange spikes—investigate their source pronto.

signals.npcLine: Quiet towns whisper: fear governs the cryptomarket swing today.
